case_title: MEX EXPRESS, INC. VS. SHIV HARI CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,674.00 FILED BY MEX EXPRESS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SHIV HARI CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MEX EXPRESS, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE: JOSE O. MARTINEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
